author: doncarbon
summary: Duplicate of S023 (@jasonsutter87). S076 describes the same callback-parameter explosion in do_run_batches (execution.py), prepare_holistic_review_payload (prepare_holistic_flow.py), and build_review_context_inner (context_builder.py). S023 was submitted ~3 hours earlier and already covers all three functions, the systemic _fn pattern, and the orchestrator wiring. S031 also overlaps on the same over-injection anti-pattern.
